# How smart WooCommerce stores boost sales automatically

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-09-27 13:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 1110

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Are you using emails to send order updates to your WooCommerce
customers?

Most store owners start out that way — it feels simple, and hey,
it used to work fine.

While email might seem "good enough", unfortunately, most
customers don’t check their inbox as often anymore — especially
in mobile-first regions.

Even worse, your order emails often land in spam or get buried
under newsletters and promotions, leaving your customers
confused, frustrated, or unaware of their order status.

If you want your store updates actually to get seen, then you
need to show up where your customers are.

That’s why I recommend using WhatsApp 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..QDMDzp_PKufnV1N8d7DjSmmaLUVpLh3ZKp_azjwUB6g )
 for WooCommerce order notifications.

With 3 billion monthly active users globally, WhatsApp is ranked
as the most popular mobile messenger app in the world.

Read the article and let me know your thoughts by replying to
this email :)

WooCommerce Automations to Grow Your Sales
-------------------------------------------

Ever wish you could automate your WooCommerce store and get more
done?

From welcome emails to abandoned cart recovery, the right
automations can increase revenue without adding extra work.

With automation, you will save time, offer a better user
experience to your customers, and ultimately increase sales.

Here are 15 WooCommerce automations 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ivtxevW7uktgvQ8fYQAphUdyN18nE5CTNqHhRjKlLSM )
 to increase sales.

Bring Back Visitors and Boost Sales
-----------------------------------

Most people who visit your store leave without buying—and never
come back. That’s revenue slipping through the cracks. With
PushEngage, you can bring those visitors back automatically using
smart, targeted web push notifications.

With push notifications, you can send abandoned cart reminders,
price drop alerts, time-sensitive offers, and more.

Here’s what one of their users has to say about PushEngage.

“PushEngage is our best converting paid traffic channels. The
open-rate is about 400% better than sending out newsletters and
also the time to create a push notification is far more
effective.”

👉 [Start Using PushEngage to Recover Lost Sales] 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.tg9iKG-sdM9L2yj7Ogv-hb1qQawzPT2v1jOREbSNB4c ) 👈

Talk soon,
